title: Set up VitePress documentation site
description:
Complete the VitePress documentation site setup by:
1. Install VitePress in docs/ directory
2. Add markdown-it-container dependency for admonitions
3. Run dev server to preview documentation
4. Generate production build
5. Test navigation and search functionality
6. Document the process and usage

The documentation generator has been created and tested successfully. Now we need to complete the setup to make the documentation site fully operational.
